description_long: This is a compact, mobile retail kiosk constructed primarily from light-colored wood panels, featuring a rectangular body with a single large wheel on one side for mobility. The front section displays open shelving with various small products, cards, and containers neatly arranged, while the side panel is branded with 'THE POUNDSHOP' in bold black letters. The shelving unit rises above the main body, providing vertical display space and additional storage, with several horizontal shelves and a back panel for product arrangement. The kiosk's design is minimalist, with clean lines and a functional, utilitarian aesthetic, and the rear section appears to be a closed storage compartment. The overall structure is boxy, with a flat roof and no visible windows or doors, and the materials suggest a lightweight yet sturdy build suitable for temporary urban placement. The color palette is dominated by pale wood tones, accented by subtle pastel stripes and black text.
description: A minimalist, mobile wooden kiosk with open shelving for product display and a large branded wheel for easy movement. The design features clean lines, pale wood tones, and functional shelving.
description_view_0: Front view shows open shelving with products, a branded side panel, and the large wheel; the main display area is visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the shelving unit and the boxy structure, with the wheel partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the closed storage compartment, the wheel, and the reversed branding; shelving contents are less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the solid, unadorned panel and the wheel, with minimal detail visible.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign, black text 'THE POUNDSHOP' on side panels, integrated into the structure.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof, constructed from the same light wood as the body, no overhangs or decorative features.
